project_type: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite SPA (frontend of a full-stack care home management app)
test_framework: No test framework configured in frontend - UI-only changes verified by build
verification_instructions: Run npm run build in the frontend directory - TypeScript compilation + Vite bundle must succeed with no errors
environment_constraints: Open internet - npm install works. No test suite configured, build success is the verification.
contribution_requirements: Commit locally only, do not push. Frontend-only changes.
key_patterns: Components use inline styles extensively (React style objects). Global CSS in frontend/src/index.css uses CSS custom properties (--primary, --surface, etc.). Dark mode via [data-theme='dark'] selector. tsconfig strict is false, so loose typing is tolerated. No CSS modules or Tailwind - everything is inline or in index.css.
directory_structure: frontend/src/pages/ contains page components. frontend/src/pages/dashboards/ has role-specific dashboards. frontend/src/components/ has shared components. frontend/src/index.css is the global stylesheet.
